\tzpentry{ID5279}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5279 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(T_{\text{total}}^{\mu\nu} = T_{\text{vacuum}}^{\mu\nu} + T_{\text{matter}}^{\mu\nu} + T_{\text{gravitational}}^{\mu\nu}\)
\]
